meaning: n.苏格兰高地人戴用的无檐帽子
examples: He says he can relate to the cutthroat world of "Glengarry's" real estate salesmen.
His dialog in Glengarry Glen Ross and Wag the Dog positively burns both with intensity and irony.
Who knew that a crew of pathetic, small-time real estate salesman (that's Glengarry Glen Ross) could be so heart-wrenching?
